title: MOSSEL BAY FIRE: Fire under control but hotspots remain
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The fire is under control...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The fire is under control but not yet fully contained.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The fire is under control but not yet fully contained."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fire crews will continue to attend to smouldering areas and identified hotspots throughout the day.","html":"Fire crews will continue to attend to smouldering areas and identified hotspots throughout the day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Authorities are closely monitoring wind direction.","html":"Authorities are closely monitoring wind direction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While temperatures are expected to drop, stronger winds are forecast, which could complicate operations.","html":"While temperatures are expected to drop, stronger winds are forecast, which could complicate operations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It has been confirmed that no firefighting crews have been stood down, and all teams remain deployed in the affected areas.","html":"It has been confirmed that no firefighting crews have been stood down, and all teams remain deployed in the affected areas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Members of the public are urged not to visit fire-affected areas, as this hampers ongoing firefighting and emergency operations.","html":"Members of the public are urged not to visit fire-affected areas, as this hampers ongoing firefighting and emergency operations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Videos: Chelsea Pieterse","html":"Videos: Chelsea Pieterse"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: MOSSEL BAY FIRE: Fire under control but hotspots remain
